en_title: Nintendo Reportedly Considering Switch 2 OLED Model — Though Remains Concerned Over How Much It Would Cost
cn_title: 任天堂据称考虑推出Switch 2 OLED版，但成本问题让公司犹豫
subtitle: OLED升级面临成本难题
opus_summary: 任天堂据称正评估搭载三星1080p OLED屏幕的Switch 2升级版，但制造成本与零部件涨价令计划仍不确定。若推进，量产或在2027年底至2028年开始。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo is reportedly considering plans to launch a Switch 2 OLED model — though remains concerned over how much it might cost.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，任天堂正在考虑推出Switch 2 OLED机型，但仍担忧它的成本会有多高。

paragraphs.en: A fresh report by ZDnet quotes industry sources familiar with plans for Nintendo to launch an upgraded Switch 2 model with a 1080p OLED screen supplied by Samsung.
paragraphs.cn: ZDnet一篇最新报道援引熟悉任天堂计划的行业消息人士称，公司拟推出升级版Switch 2，搭载由三星供应的1080p OLED屏幕。

paragraphs.en: But while apparently in discussion, these plans still remain uncertain due to the increased costs involved, it's reported. OLED screens are widely considered better quality than LCD, which Switch 2 currently uses, but come with higher manufacturing costs that will need to be passed onto the consumer. And that's on top of the spiralling cost of existing semiconductors and other electronic components — an issue that has already seen Nintendo announce $50 Switch 2 price rises just a year after the platform launched.
paragraphs.cn: 报道称，虽然相关方案显然正在讨论，但成本上涨使计划仍存在不确定性。OLED屏幕通常被认为比Switch 2当前采用的LCD质量更高，但制造成本也更高，而这部分成本需要转嫁给消费者。此外，半导体及其他电子元件的价格也在不断攀升；Switch 2上市仅一年后，任天堂便已因此宣布涨价50美元(约合人民币340元)。

paragraphs.en: Should Nintendo move forward with its Switch 2 OLED plans, development on the model could begin late this year, with mass production then pegged for late 2027 or 2028. This would place its launch around the same time, roughly three to four years on from the Switch 2 launch.
paragraphs.cn: 如果任天堂推进Switch 2 OLED计划，该机型可能在今年晚些时候启动开发，并于2027年底或2028年进入大规模生产。这样一来，其上市时间大约会落在Switch 2发售三至四年后。

paragraphs.en: Of course, the original Switch also saw an OLED model release — just over four years on from the console's initial launch — and there has long been expectation that Nintendo would do similar with its console successor. Some fans had even hoped that Switch 2 would launch with an OLED screen as standard, though Nintendo has confirmed previously that it opted to revert back to LCD in order to keep costs down .
paragraphs.cn: 当然，初代Switch也曾在主机首发四年多后推出OLED机型，因此外界长期预计任天堂会对其后继主机采取类似做法。一些粉丝甚至希望Switch 2首发时便标配OLED屏幕，不过任天堂此前已确认，为控制成本，公司选择重新采用LCD。

paragraphs.en: So far, there has been no word on a Switch 2 Lite, despite success of the Switch Lite, the more affordably-priced version of Nintendo's hardware that featured a smaller screen and price point.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管屏幕更小、售价更亲民的Switch Lite取得了成功，目前仍没有Switch 2 Lite的消息。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo has already begun adjusting its base Switch 2 design for Europe, meanwhile, with fresh versions of the Switch 2 and its various controllers rolling out from this fall onwards, now with user-replaceable batteries to comply with EU legislation. Nintendo will not be updating its aging Switch 1 hardware — and instead will simply remove it from sale in mid-February next year. There's also been word of a slightly improved screen on the way — which may improve the Switch 2's ghosting issues — though nothing official has yet been stated.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，任天堂已开始为欧洲市场调整基础款Switch 2设计。从今年秋季起推出的新版Switch 2及各类手柄将配备用户可更换电池，以符合欧盟法规。任天堂不会更新日渐老旧的Switch 1硬件，而会在明年2月中旬直接停售。另有消息称，一款略有改进、可能缓解Switch 2拖影问题的屏幕也在筹备中，但官方尚未发布任何声明。

paragraphs.en: Not got a Switch 2 yet? In the U.S., Canada and Europe you have until September 1 to buy one before its $50 price rise kicks in .
paragraphs.cn: 还没买Switch 2？美国、加拿大和欧洲消费者可在9月1日前购买，之后50美元(约合人民币340元)的涨价将正式生效。
